title: ToolTreaux 10X Jewelers Loupe 25mm Diameter Glass Lens Magnifier Plastic
description:
The ToolTreaux 10X Magnification Jewelers Loupe in plastic provides simple yet effective magnification designed to help you see small details more closely. Unlike a magnifying glass, loupes have a focusing lens that is contained in housing that protects the lens when not in use. Our loupe features a black plastic body that will ensure that your lens is safe from scratches and fingerprints that may obstruct the view of the small items you're working with. This loupe features a 10X magnification power and provides jewelers, watch makers or photographers the ability to pinpoint areas that need extra attention. The lens has an extra large diameter of 25mm making it an ideal size for small items like beads, jewels, rhinestones, sequins and other items that require precision

ToolTreaux 10X Jewelers Loupe 25mm Diameter Glass Lens Magnifier Plastic

The ToolTreaux 10X Magnification Jewelers Loupe in plastic provides simple yet effective magnification designed to help you see small details more closely. Unlike a magnifying glass, loupes have a focusing lens that is contained in housing that protects the lens when not in use. Our loupe features a black plastic body that will ensure that your lens is safe from scratches and fingerprints that may obstruct the view of the small items you're working with.

Key Features

  • 10X MAGNIFICATION POWER - Loupe magnifies small objects by 10 | Ideal for jewelry makers, watch repairs and hobby crafters placing, setting and identifying tiny materials
  • PLASTIC BODY - Durable yet lightweight plastic body protects lens from scratches and fingerprints when not in use
  • 25MM DIAMETER LENS - Extra large lens is perfect size for viewing beads, gems, rhinestones, jewels, sequins and other materials requiring precision
  • COMPACT DESIGN - Loupe measures just 1" tall and 1.25" wide | Easily fits inside craft boxes, hobby tool kits, supply drawers or workshop storage
  • VERSATILE MAGNIFIER - Designed for for jewelry making but great for watchmaking and repair, photography, printing, dentistry, tattooing, biology/geology, coin collecting and more

Product Specifications

  • MPN: UT10XJLPL
  • UPC: 810058485380
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 10X

This loupe features a 10X magnification power and provides jewelers, watch makers or photographers the ability to pinpoint areas that need extra attention. The lens has an extra large diameter of 25mm making it an ideal size for small items like beads, jewels, rhinestones, sequins and other items that require precision.

This loupe is housed inside of a durable yet lightweight plastic body, and measures just 1" tall so it can easily fit inside any craft box, hobby tool kit or supply drawer. This is a must-have magnifying tool for anyone who needs a better look at small items and details.
